purpose: Assess installation, runtime, schema, startup, adoption, underlay readiness, and artifact-hygiene gaps so the harness can measure state and suggest corrections without acting as an instruction authority.

host_context.description: Optional host context such as codex, claude, cursor, or generic.

expected_capabilities.description: Optional capabilities the current environment expects to have available.

workspace_role.description: Role envelope declaring whether this workspace is schema/plugin source-delivery, a material governance consumer, or mixed/undetermined before adoption claims are interpreted.

runtime_provenance.description: Runtime provenance envelope declaring whether the callable harness came from user profile install, repo-local install, source checkout, or an unknown/external runtime lane.

consumer_material_governance_check.description: Whether governed AGENTS materialization checks apply to this workspace role.

installation_state.description: Current repo/bootstrap state for Anarchy-AI in this workspace.

runtime_state.description: Current runtime state for the harness relative to the workspace.

schema_state.description: Condensed schema reality, integrity, and possession summary.

underlay_readiness.description: Non-mutating readiness result that separates portable schema/template availability from actual repo utilization of narrative and governed AGENTS surfaces.

agent_actions.description: Compatibility suggestions for agent-available follow-up. Values are advisory terrain/correction options, not instructions from the harness.

narrative_arc_conformance_state.description: Read-only narrative Arc conformance state from validate_narrative_arc_state.

narrative_arc_finding_count.description: Number of mechanical narrative Arc conformance findings observed during readiness measurement.

artifact_hygiene.description: Non-destructive scan result for repo-local generated artifact directories, with relocation-oriented safe repairs rather than deletion guidance.

observed_artifact_paths.description: Repo-relative generated artifact directories observed under the workspace root.

recommended_artifact_lanes.description: Preferred OS-local lanes for build/cache/runtime/scratch output.

safe_repairs.description: Relocation-oriented repair suggestions; this assessment does not delete anything.

doctor_summary.description: Measurement-first readiness summary that describes observed state, gaps, suggested corrections, and common pitfalls without issuing agent or human instructions.

measurement_summary.description: Concise statement of what was measured and the non-authoritative posture of correction fields.

observed_state.description: Condensed state facts drawn from installation, runtime, schema, underlay readiness, artifact hygiene, and adoption measurements.

blocking_gaps.description: Measured gaps likely to block a readiness/adoption claim until corrected or explicitly waived.

non_blocking_gaps.description: Measured gaps or utilization gaps that should remain visible but do not alone prove the workspace unusable.

suggested_corrections.description: Correction options derived from measured state. These are terrain suggestions, not commands.

recommended_next_actions.description: Suggested next measurement or correction moves. The field is advisory and does not override human or repo authority.

human_review_recommended.description: True when measured gaps or operator-lane suggestions should be surfaced for human attention.

human_attention_reasons.description: Reasons human attention may be useful, expressed as observed state or operator-lane suggestions.

observed_pitfalls.description: Common misreadings for the observed state, phrased as pitfalls rather than prohibitions.

structural_grounding.description: Measurement-aware structural grounding payload. The tool still runs; this field labels the schema/underlay surfaces the output presumes, what was observed, and how missing or partial surfaces qualify claim scope.

required_structural_surfaces.description: Schema, narrative, underlay, or marketplace surfaces the output depends on for structurally grounded claims.

observed_structural_surfaces.description: Observed schema, narrative, underlay, repo-role, and tool facts measured at tool entry.

missing_or_partial_surfaces.description: Missing, invalid, partial, or role-ambiguous surfaces that weaken grounding.

recommended_next_actions.description: Advisory measurement or correction moves such as run_gov2gov_migration:plan_only or /underlay /refresh /apply. These are terrain suggestions, not commands.

claim_scope_effect.description: How the observed structural grounding qualifies the scope of the tool output.

adoption_state.description: Overall adoption state for the harness in this workspace and host context.

missing_components.description: Missing or unresolved environment pieces preventing full adoption.

safe_repairs.description: Safe repair or completion moves suggested from the current state.

admin_actions.description: Compatibility field for operator-lane suggestions. Values are advisory terrain/correction options, not instructions from the harness.

agent_actions.description: Compatibility field for agent-available suggestions. Values are advisory terrain/correction options, not instructions from the harness.

evidence_basis.description: What the assessment used to ground the result.

paths.description: Nested path evidence using `origin`, `source`, and `destination` roles rather than flat path fields.

structural_grounding.description: Measurement-aware structural grounding payload. The tool still runs; this field labels the schema/underlay surfaces the output presumes, what was observed, and how missing or partial surfaces qualify claim scope.

required_structural_surfaces.description: Schema, narrative, underlay, or marketplace surfaces the output depends on for structurally grounded claims.

observed_structural_surfaces.description: Observed schema, narrative, underlay, repo-role, and tool facts measured at tool entry.

missing_or_partial_surfaces.description: Missing, invalid, partial, or role-ambiguous surfaces that weaken grounding.

recommended_next_actions.description: Advisory measurement or correction moves such as run_gov2gov_migration:plan_only or /underlay /refresh /apply. These are terrain suggestions, not commands.

claim_scope_effect.description: How the observed structural grounding qualifies the scope of the tool output.

narrative_arc_validation.description: Embedded validate_narrative_arc_state result. The assessment still runs; this labels narrative conformance terrain for Arc/authorship work.

workspace_role.statement: This workspace deliberately combines schema/harness development with plugin delivery in one source repo.

runtime_provenance.statement: This callable harness is running from the current user's installed plugin bundle. It is convenient and valid as an installed runtime, but it is not source truth for the workspace being evaluated.

doctor_summary.measurement_summary: Measured install, runtime, schema, underlay utilization, narrative Arc conformance, artifact hygiene, adoption, and path evidence; correction fields are recommendations, not authority.

structural_grounding_requirement.output_behavior: non_blocking_measurement_label; tools always run and label grounding rather than refusing execution
structural_grounding_requirement.description: assess_harness_gap_state measures install, runtime, schema, underlay, artifact hygiene, and structural grounding even when prerequisite surfaces are absent.
